rule: Node "authOptions" in C:/Users/drlee/College_organizer/src/lib/auth/index.ts accesses PII data without a detected upstream authentication gate.

affected_nodes.detail: Node "authOptions" in C:/Users/drlee/College_organizer/src/lib/auth/index.ts accesses PII data without a detected upstream authentication gate.

remediation: Add a getUser() / getSession() check before accessing PII fields, or wrap in a protectedProcedure.
